# Changelog

All notable changes to this project are documented here.
Follow [Keep a Changelog](https://keepachangelog.com/en/1.1.0/) and [Semantic Versioning](https://semver.org/spec/v2.0.0.html).

---

## [X.Y.Z] - YYYY-MM-DD

*Replace `X.Y.Z` with the released crate version and the date with the release date in ISO 8601 format.*

### Added

*New public APIs, traits, structs, enums, or CLI flags introduced in this release. Each item is a **minor** or **major** bump trigger. Link the PR or issue. Example: "Add `Foo::builder()` constructor ([#42](../../pull/42))."*

- 

### Changed

*Breaking or behavioural changes to existing functionality (rename, signature change, semantic shift). Breaking changes require a **major** bump; non-breaking behavioural changes are **minor**. Example: "Rename `Bar::run` to `Bar::execute`; update call-sites ([#57](../../pull/57))."*

- 

### Deprecated

*Items still present but scheduled for removal in a future major release. Annotate with `#[deprecated]` in source and note the replacement. Example: "Deprecate `legacy_parse()`; use `parse_v2()` instead ([#61](../../pull/61))."*

- 

### Removed

*Items deleted after a prior deprecation notice. Always a **major** bump. Example: "Remove `Config::from_env_legacy()`, deprecated since 1.3.0 ([#74](../../pull/74))."*

- 

### Fixed

*Bug fixes that correct documented or clearly unintended behaviour. Patch bump unless the fix breaks a workaround. Example: "Fix panic on empty input slice in `tokenize()` ([#88](../../issues/88))."*

- 

### Security

*Vulnerabilities patched; include CVE identifier when available and advise users to upgrade. Example: "Fix ReDoS in `pattern_match()` (CVE-2025-XXXXX) ([#99](../../pull/99))."*

- 

---

<!-- Semver impact summary:
     - MAJOR if any item appears under Removed, or Changed contains a breaking API/behaviour change.
     - MINOR if any item appears under Added or Deprecated with no breaking changes.
     - PATCH if only Fixed or Security items are present.
     Delete this comment before committing the changelog. -->
